description: Style Note   The Spanish influences in the design details of this sandal is the reason for the Spanish name, senorita. Subtle pastel hues, super soft footbed styling and classic designs with a sophisticated polish, style this pair with kohl-rimmed eyes and an ethno-western ensemble!     Product Description   Sandal with thong style strap in orange with beads on it and a toe separator   Smooth, printed footbed   Textured TPU outsole with an upraised heel     Material and Care   Synthetic   Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust   Do not machine wash or use a drier   Do not store in direct sunlight
